label: v2 RAYMARCH rebuild — real geometry/normals/light; kill the mandala; fix audio_out cookalways fps 0->60
note: Nick rejected v1 as 'cheap audio visualizer'. Chose 'raymarch it properly' over 2D-surface / kill-mandala-only / re-approach. Node chain UNCHANGED — this is a shader rewrite plus one par fix in base_audio.

operations.before: v1 shader — 2D polar 1/r map + kaleido() hex fold; colour ramped off scalar fbm; no normals, no light, no specular; min(col,BONE) hard clip; screen-space drift

operations.note: THE fps 0 CAUSE. audiodeviceoutCHOP with cookalways=True is a documented freeze in WOBAR_TWOZERO_GUIDE limitations. Was burning 68.6ms/cook, 1223ms/s CPU, 7352% of budget. Set False -> fps 0 -> 60 instantly. Did not appear in nonDefaultPars because it is a Common-page par.

operations.parameter: vec1/vec2/vec7 valuex (temporarily pinned to constants for a look test, then restored to EXPRESSION)
operations.note: restored — verified all 9 uniforms back on ParMode.EXPRESSION
